title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 29.015 - State auditor, term of office, term begins, when
text:
29.015.  State auditor, term of office, term begins, when. — The state auditor shall hold office for a term of four years beginning at 12:00 noon on the second Monday in January next after his or her election and until a successor is elected and qualified.
(L. 1987 H.B. 456)
